title: PrettyPrinter: init (WIP)
body:
Introduces PrettyPrinter for use emitting "intelligently" formatted output given a stream of tokens (strings, breaks, begin/end marking groups).

Based on Oppen's algorithm (citation in PrettyPrinter.cpp, as well as some notes/attributions).

See the file headers for more information, and the unit test for a few function call examples at different widths.  Output style depends on strategy used for groups and break placement/parameters, these are not meant to be necessarily how we output anything but demonstrate and test a few possibilities.

This PR changes no CIRCT behavior.

Draft to expose this while under development.

Contains commits from #4082 to enable unit testing again.

Plan:
* [x] Add a builder/convenience helper next to make using this much easier to use and to manage the Token's while they're streaming through the printer. ( #4091 ).
* [ ] Start integrating this with ExportVerilog.
